positive: A majestic, stylized neon bioluminescent forest scene. The main subject is a group of stylized, geometric flora and fauna (e.g., glowing mushrooms, graceful deer silhouettes, crystalline butterflies) arranged in a central, harmonious composition. Use a limited color palette dominated by deep indigo, electric cyan, neon magenta, and emerald green. The overall style should be retro-futuristic vaporwave meets Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print, with strong, clean outlines and negative space. Ensure the artwork is entirely scalable and printable, designed for textile repeat or central placement. Cinematic studio lighting, high contrast, perfect symmetry, crisp edges, highly detailed, ethereal glow.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, text, watermark, logo, trademark, low resolution, artifact, messy, dirty, graffiti, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grayscale, bokeh, muted colors
